case_title: EDWARD BELLAMINE VS. WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-02-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-02-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF EDWARD BLLAMINE IS PRESENT.
